full_suite.failure_notes: Time-boxed with Ctrl-C after 1002.71s at ~34%. Failures: test_best_stack_manifest.py::test_best_stack_manifest_integrity (concurrent best_stack revision 13 vs stale expected 12); test_compare_court_proposals.py::test_compare_img1605_partial_labels_rejects_current_bad_proposal (pre-existing owner-label count 15 vs expected 14); test_court_calibration_metric15.py::test_real_burlington_fixture_preserves_legacy_numeric_payload_and_adds_typed_contract (pre-existing dirty fixture hash); 12 test_court_finding_technology_benchmark.py failures (another lane added a sixth pbvision discovery surface and modified related court fixtures, invalidating expected sample_count=5 and selector outputs). None touch one-world-owned files, but HEAD-before proof was not run, so failures_all_preexisting remains false. A13 correction: this lane also made test_scaffold_tool_index.py red during the wide-suite window through nonconforming schema filenames and two unknown CLI categories. That test had not been reached before the wide run was time-boxed. The lane-owned cause is fixed and separately verified 3 passed, REAL_EXIT=0; it is not attributed to concurrent volatility.

honest_issues: This lane made the repo-wide scaffold-index test red from initial schema creation until A13: dot-schema filenames violated the checked-in pattern and two one-world CLIs categorized as unknown. Track C correctly flagged it; this lane fixed both defects and verified 3 passed with REAL_EXIT=0.
A9 is not green: the wide suite was time-boxed at 16m42s with 15 unrelated dirty-tree failures and only ~34% collected tests completed; failures were attributed but not proven against clean HEAD.
M1 has zero supported Wolverine events: 22/24 fail the 1.2m co-location gate and 2/24 are too close to call. Median is undefined, so the <=0.60m numeric target is not claimed.

The initial git-status diagnostic printed protected label paths into the transcript. No protected label content was read or used, but this violates the transcript-path rule and independently prevents PASS.
Wolverine bounce anchors arrive exactly at z=r_b, so real M2 residuals are zero before/after. Synthetic nonzero tests prove the pass itself never snaps.
Gen-2 regeneration did not mint refined selectors because volatile process_video tracking reuse failed closed without a migration attestation.

Demo tier distribution: 10776/20922 ray_court_projection (51.5%), 0 measured/physics, 10146/20922 honest absence (48.5%) where no visible 2D detection exists. Four-player coverage remains 0 because players/BODY are absent.

Wolverine tier distribution: 295/300 arc_measured (98.3%), 5/300 physics_predicted (1.7%), 0 absent; measured coverage remains 0.39, coverage_with_predicted@0.5 remains 0.39 because all 5 predicted frames are below confidence threshold.

Demo has 0 player, 0 paddle, and 0 contact states; A10 correctly carries paddle poses only where paddle input exists. This does not satisfy the broader owner dream of four demo players without upstream tracking/BODY/paddle inputs.
Storage audit EXIT 1 because historical allowlisted fixtures are missing; unknown large tracked/untracked files were both empty.
